Assumed scope: One primary region unavailable; other regions healthy
Detection: Correlated service errors, provider status, synthetic checks, business impact
Response pattern: Fence writes, validate replica/standby, activate paired region, redirect consumers
Rely on managed multi-zone behavior or reschedule; do not invoke full DR unless blast radius expands

Assumed scope: Identity, KMS, network, DNS, source, SaaS or partner dependency unavailable
Response pattern: Use degraded mode, queue/retry, alternate identity/key/network path where approved

Assumed scope: Bad transformation, schema change, operator error or malicious update
Detection: Data quality, reconciliation, anomaly and lineage signals
Response pattern: Stop propagation, preserve evidence, identify clean point, restore/reprocess and reconcile

Assumed scope: Credential compromise, ransomware, destructive admin or supply-chain event
Response pattern: Isolate, revoke, preserve evidence, clean-room restore, security gate before release

Assumed scope: Database primary changes or logs unavailable
Response pattern: Recover source, use stream recovery, backfill gap, deduplicate destination

Assumed scope: IAM, policy, DNS, pipeline or service configuration removed
Response pattern: Reapply approved version from Git/IaC after security review
